title: Quite Logical
body:
# 🧩Quite Logical🧩
**Quite Logical** is a Fabric mod designed to expand the vanilla Minecraft experience by adding features that feel consistent with the original game's logic and aesthetics.

The goal of this mod is to introduce functional items and mechanics that bridge gaps in the current vanilla gameplay. As this is the developer's first project, the focus is on maintaining simplicity while ensuring the additions feel like a natural part of the game.

# Current Features


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- ## 🕯️ Glow Stick
> The **Glow Stick** is a portable, temporary light source designed for cave exploration and underwater visibility where traditional torches may be impractical.
> 
> ![glow stick recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82d32bdafbe7cdd344330735095e46a0fdebcad.png)
>
> ![Underwater can glow now!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8de2801109a6ad182b866bb09a99bebcf16f5a9e_0.webp)
>
>![Clear vision through the night river](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89a89424fe6d931cc83f2da6343d271ccf5925d6_0.webp)


- ## 🌼 Torchflowers
> Torchflowers now glow with a soft, natural light!
>
>![glow!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2671661c8a2ccf0bfd4efee173990ba46bcb4fed_0.webp)

- ## 🏷️ Name Tag Recipe
> Backported the **Name Tag** recipe from the 26.1 snapshot.
> 
> ![name tag recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/294d6a614d44fc832ba03e74c14ab4fb8d585fc9.gif)

- ## 👻 Happy Ghasts Now Move Faster
> Press **"W"** to accelerate while riding. 
> 
> **"Potions of Swiftness"** now correctly affect Happy Ghasts.

- ## 🛒 Advanced Railway Engineering (Copper Rails)

> Tired of expensive gold propulsion? Powered Rails are now crafted using Copper! Furthermore, they now react to the environment just like other copper blocks, introducing a new layer of strategy to your rail networks.
>
> Oxidation System: Copper rails oxidize over time through four stages: Unaffected, Exposed, Weathered, and Oxidized.
>
> Dynamic Speed Control: The oxidation level directly affects minecart physics. You can now use specific rails as natural speed limiters or high-speed boosters:
>
>
> ![rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/890eb0879b9a6f2cec4728b85d09402134ab2af7.png)
>
>![oxidized rail block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12f7db4398b250784266868609214e8156398b6.png)
>
> Standard (Unaffected): 100% Speed (1.0) - Maximum acceleration.
>
> Exposed: 80% Speed (0.8)
>
> Weathered: 60% Speed (0.6)
>
> Oxidized: 40% Speed (0.4) - Great for safe turns or arrivals!
> 
>
>Maintenance: Use Honeycomb or Resin Clumps to wax and lock a rail's speed stage. Use an Axe to scrape off oxidation or let Lightning clean the tracks!
> 
>
> ![copper rails!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5952863a839e30e2fa3339cb06cdfff10076309c.png)


- ## 🍯 Resin Clumps for Copper
> Wax Detector Visuals: Holding a Honeycomb or Resin Clump will now reveal already waxed blocks and Copper Golems by emitting shiny particles.
>
> Preservation: Use Resin Clumps to wax and preserve your Copper blocks or Copper Golems.
>
> 
>  ![wax with resin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a72ffc28bffc3083d640965c12877a06c41713fd.png)


- ## 🥔 Posionous Potato
>
> Stop eating the poison—start throwing it!
>
> Throwable Projectile: Poisonous potatoes now follow the same aerodynamic trajectory as snowballs or ender pearls.
> 
> **Combat Utility**: Deals 0.5 heart damage on impact with a 60% chance to inflict Poison I for 5 seconds.
> 
> **Throw-Only Mode**: To prevent accidental ingestion, the "eat" animation and duration have been removed. It is now a dedicated throwing weapon.
>
> 
> ### 🤢 Brewing Potion of Poison with **Posionous Potato**
>
> ![potion of poison brew recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f23b76f053c4ba2e9a05f0bb53191c3fc166206.png)


- ## 🛡️ Bedrock Armor Stand
> Bring your Armor Stands to life with **11 iconic poses** brought straight from the Bedrock Edition!
>
> **Instant Swap**: Simply **"Shift + Right-Click"** to instantly swap your current equipment with the Armor Stand.
>
> Now Redstone compatible !
> 
>  ![Praise the sun!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b79ec5f6c2c735f7e218fc2f09c854012fc277af.png)
> 


- ## 🐎 Logic for Riders
> Because riding a horse shouldn't mean losing your survival instincts.
>
> **Permanent Food Bar**: Your hunger bar no longer disappears when you mount up. Stay aware of your nutrition at all times.
> 
> **Smart Health Layout**: Horse hearts are shifted to the oxygen bar's position to keep the UI clean.
> 
> **Realistic Head Movement**: Horses lower their heads when ridden, clearing your field of view for better combat and navigation


- ## 🎷 Copper Goat Horn G.O.A.T
>
> ![Copper Goat Horn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4e6fc7cd70d88cbc94cbc3e0aea3721e6d1b4a8.png)
>
> **Bonding**: Simply Right-Click on your horse to register it to the horn.
> 
> **Instant Summon**: Once bound, Right-Click the horn from anywhere to instantly teleport your horse to your current position.
> 
> **Safe Travels**: Adventure as far as you want! Whether you're climbing mountains or crossing deserts, you never have to worry about losing your horse again.
> 
> **Dimensional Limits**: Please note that the horn's magic works only within the same dimension; it cannot summon horses across different worlds (e.g., from the Overworld to the Nether).
>
> 
> Durability & Repair:
>  - The horn has 30 durability points.
>  - It will break after 30 uses if left unmaintained.
>  - Keep your horn in top shape by repairing it with Copper Ingots at an anvil!


- ## 🏃‍♂️Manual Crawling (Toggle/Hold)
>
> No more trapdoor-flicking! QLogic introduces a dedicated Crawl key (Default: Z).
>
> **True Hitbox Reduction**: Shrinks your height to 0.6 blocks, allowing you to traverse 1-block gaps freely.
> 
> **Mount Safety**: Smart detection prevents crawling while riding mounts or vehicles, ensuring no animation glitches occur.
> 
> 
> ![Crawl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67a706384b6f3d7a0c8fc064aa3635d7bacbf8a0.png)
> 


- ## 🔍 Spyglass is now more USEFUL!
>
> **Dynamic Zoom**: Adjust your zoom level in real-time using the scroll wheel while using the Spyglass.
> 
> **World Marker (Ping) System**: Quickly mark locations in the world with the **"V"** key.
> 
> **Smart Interaction**: Markers automatically disappear when you reach the target coordinates.
> 
> Unique Player Colors: Every player is assigned a permanent, unique color based on their UUID. All your pings and markers will appear in your signature color.
> 
> Dynamic Beacon Beams: Pinging a location shoots a vibrant beacon beam into the sky that matches your unique color.
>
>
> ![Horse info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2bb7c08c7c019da63c8f22f38d2baafb4c39499.png)
>
> ![Beehive info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2686d4d67b155c659dd70a710eae821c277f9f4.png)


- ## 🔥Terraria-Inspired Campfire Healing
>
> Lit campfires now provide a **Restorative Aura**. Standing within 5 blocks grants a Regeneration effect.
>
> **Smart Buff Management**: The effect is infinite while near the fire but is removed the moment you step away. It intelligently ignores existing high-level potion effects to prevent overwriting.
>
>
> ![campfire regeneration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d32f064367178bf0549dd3a50d43d1985fa68d69_0.webp)


- ## 🧭 Advanced Locator & Compass Sync
> inspired by rpg games
> 
> **Lodestone Tracking**: Waypoints are rendered as dots directly on your locator bar.
> 
> **Tab-to-Reveal**: Hold the **Player List (Tab)** key to see the names of all waypoints regardless of your viewing angle.
> 
> **Bedrock Coordinates**: A compact XYZ HUD appears whenever a compass is in your inventory.
> 
> ![locator bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfea9c23e7c521518adf4ecf3d90ff342b5b7e69.png)
> 
> ![locator br tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f4c735264d2f6e43b4dca5dc4f088c3f18ca653.png)


- ## 🐮 Cows Fight Back!
>
> Cows are no longer passive bystanders. They will now fiercely **protect their herd** if they sense a threat.
> 

- ## 🧟 Leader Zombie Now have New Texture!
>
> - Leader Zombie: A specialized zombie with a unique texture.
> ![Leader Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a8597e3cc86f807231f507065ba1ce2eba9353a.png)
> 
>
> - Jungle Zombie: Adapted to the thick vegetation of the jungle.
>
> - Frostbite: A frozen variant found in snowy and cold biomes.


- ## 🔥 Vanilla Tweaks Integration
>
> Includes "Lower Fire" and "Lower Shield" features to improve overall visibility during combat.



</details>




-------------


# Development Status: Alpha
This mod is currently in its Alpha stage.

- **Beginner Project**: Please note that this is a learning project for a beginner developer.
- **Feedback**: Feedback is welcome as the mod continues to evolve and more "logical" expansions are added to the game.

## Installation
- Loader: Fabric
- Requirements: Fabric API
